headline: ResMed Inc (NYSE:RMD): A Durable Dividend Growth Stock for Passive Income
summary: ResMed Inc. offers a sustainable dividend with a 10-year growth history, backed by strong profitability, a low payout ratio, and a rock-solid balance sheet for durable passive income.
